header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Learning & Programs professional who thrives on designing training experiences grounded in evidence and adult-learning principles, owning programs end-to-end from needs assessment through facilitation and analytics, and partnering cross-functionally for sustainable impact. I increasingly use AI and automation to build smarter, more scalable learning systems—through human-centered, systematic design.

bullets.text: Run needs assessments with 25+ {cross|stakeholders}, then design and deliver training programs for 600+ participants—achieving a 78% {prog|program enrollment rate} by aligning curriculum to real performance gaps

Build and maintain {prog|SOPs, facilitator guides, job aids, and a self-service knowledge base} for 70+ {cross|cross-functional} staff, reducing onboarding time by 75% and enabling scalable self-directed learning

Lead {coord|end-to-end program and project management} across 20+ concurrent initiatives, 10+ vendors, and multiple stakeholders—tracking completion, {data|assessment results}, and participation to drive continuous improvement
Redesign and standardize manual {ex|processes} using {tools|AI tools} and {data|feedback analysis}, identifying inefficiencies and implementing scalable solutions across the learning journey
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery interviews to diagnose absenteeism, then {data|analyze} 300+ leave cases—surfacing $362K in costs that drove policy redesigns
Conduct focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to surface decision-making and {cross|accountability} gaps and recommend process changes
Analyzed 2,000+ {data|employee experiences} to surface satisfaction drivers and guide C-suite decisions on where to focus
Contributed to an L&D initiative—designing and piloting survey instruments to assess readiness gaps and inform manager-effectiveness programs
Prepared and presented insights to senior leadership on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects on survey development, rewards & recognition, and learning & development
Optimized {ex|onboarding} across 3 global locations via process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities across the employee lifecycle
Initiated a DEI pilot by designing and facilitating an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 additional global locations
Supported organizational change by helping direct a Mergers & Acquisitions project, coordinating {cross|cross-functional stakeholders}
Assisted in employee relations cases, ensuring compliance with local labor laws and confidentiality
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
